title: S4-C8-GE3
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|S4}} {{Droid |type= |image=[[File:S4-c81.jpg]] |name=S4-C8-GE3 |homeworld= |birth= |death= |creator= |manufacturer=[[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]] |line= |model=[[GE3-series protocol droid]]''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' |class=[[Protocol droid/Legends|Protocol droid]] |cost= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Feminine programming]] |pronouns=new |sensor=White |plating= |armament= |equipment=*Data recorder *High-powered burst-transmitter |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Maybe if the droid's not very good, there's some credits to be made here.''"
"''Oh, most certainly, sir. I am not a good player. Quite the mark, as it were.|[[Atton Rand]] and S4-C8|}} '''S4-C8-GE3''' was a [[GE3-series protocol droid]] with [[Gender/Legends|feminine programming]] in [[3951 BBY]]. She had what appeared to be a personality quirk: an obsession for [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]]. She was a regular at the [[Pazaak Den]] next to the [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] [[Refugee Sector]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]]. One reason she was so popular was because, despite having a passion for the game, she was very bad at it, and would often lose large sums of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] on wagers. By chance, S4 met [[Meetra Surik]], who was looking to draw out the infamous [[The Champ|Champ]]. However, Surik became suspicious of her personality quirk, and discovered that the supposed faulty programming that had compelled S4 to come to the cantina and play, was in fact a cleverly disguised routine for gathering sensitive information by remote. To further her goals, Surik fixed the programming and S4 lost interest in the game. ==Behind the scenes== S4-C8's first and only appearance was [[Obsidian Entertainment]]'s [[2004]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' [[Star Wars video games|video game]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=S4-C8-GE3 }} [[Category:Droids with feminine programming]] [[Category:GE3-series protocol droids]] [[Category:Nar Shaddaa residents]]
